summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sonar AI app builder E2B VS Code integration feature. Successfully tested backend APIs, user authentication, project creation, and VS Code environment provisioning UI flows.

Backend API endpoints work (9/10 tests passed)

All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
